status: live comparison pilot; not manual validation

sample.design: proportional venue strata with minimum one record per venue

operation: known-record alignment and abstract-field availability; conditional on TopVenues inclusion
logical_http_request_definition: One protocol operation; retries would be separate network attempts, but the initial pilot did not retain attempt counts.
raw_observation_schema_note: pilot_observations.csv preserves legacy *_cost_usd columns. DBLP/Semantic Scholar values were hard-coded zeros; OpenAlex values are server-reported API-budget metering. They are not comparable monetary-cost measurements.

topvenues.latency_scope: Warm local SQLite read path; excludes snapshot construction and host-resource cost.

dblp.record_match_basis: The frozen denominator was constructed from these DBLP keys; no independent live-recall claim.
dblp.abstract_basis: DBLP record metadata/dump exposes no abstract field.
dblp.latency_status: n/a: responsible 1.05-second pacing run was stopped after repeated 20-second zero-byte timeouts; one earlier availability probe completed in 744.621 ms, which is not a sample.
dblp.request_count_status: not retained: the live run was incomplete; reported match and abstract counts come from frozen DBLP keys and the DBLP schema, not 200 live requests

semantic_scholar.retry_count: not recorded in this pilot; transient 429 was observed during setup

openalex.authentication_mode: not retained in the initial pilot
openalex.metering_completeness: final-response values retained for 200 logical requests; earlier retry attempts were not retained
openalex.metering_interpretation: Sum of retained final-response per-request API-budget values; not an invoice or out-of-pocket charge. Account/free-allowance state and earlier retry attempts were not retained.

title_search.metering_note: Includes all 57 title searches, including the three HTTP 400 responses.

limitations: The sample is conditioned on TopVenues having a non-empty abstract and cannot estimate missing-paper recall.
Live scholarly services drift; the date, fixed sample, protocol, and per-record observations are part of the result.
Cross-source text agreement is not correctness and neither Semantic Scholar nor OpenAlex is a gold standard.
DBLP live latency is intentionally left n/a after a responsible run encountered repeated timeouts.
The initial pilot did not retain retry counts or end-to-end wall time; retained request latency excludes pacing, backoff, and earlier failed attempts.
The OpenAlex $0.057 value is server-reported API-budget metering, not an invoice or out-of-pocket cost; DBLP and Semantic Scholar expose no comparable meter in this pilot.
